summary: Frontend test suite for FR-BRICK-002 (Brick Color Selection Palette, Issue #9) is complete. All 4 required test IDs (T-FE-BRICK-002-01 through T-FE-BRICK-002-04) are implemented in src/tests/unit/BrickPalette.test.tsx on branch feature/9-brick-color-palette-test. PR #50 is open and ready for review. The BrickPalette component is already fully implemented in scaffolding. Tests use real Zustand store for behavioral coverage and include full NFR-A11Y-001 accessibility assertions.

artifacts.name: BrickPalette.test.tsx
artifacts.description: Unit and behavioral tests for BrickPalette — T-FE-BRICK-002-01 through T-FE-BRICK-002-04 plus accessibility and default-state coverage

human_review_required.reason: Standard human gate before implementation agent proceeds

recommended_actions: Verify BrickPalette.tsx stub is replaced with full implementation (already done in scaffolding).
Confirm colorPalette.ts has all 12 LEGO colors (already verified).
Confirm setActiveColor action in useBrickStore.ts updates activeColorId (already verified).
Run test suite: npx vitest run src/tests/unit/BrickPalette.test.tsx
Ensure all T-FE-BRICK-002-01 through T-FE-BRICK-002-04 pass.
Open implementation PR referencing test PR #50.
